title: Customers With a Month-Over-Month Increase In Order Frequency
description: Find customers who have at least one month where their order count is greater than in the immediately previous observed month.
sql_solution: WITH counts AS (SELECT customer_id, month, COUNT(*) cnt FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id, month), lagged AS (SELECT *, LAG(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month) prev FROM counts) SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM lagged WHERE prev IS NOT NULL AND cnt > prev;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

monthly_counts = orders.groupBy("customer_id", "month").agg(count(lit(1)).alias("cnt"))
lag_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(col("month"))

result = (
    monthly_counts.withColumn("prev", lag("cnt").over(lag_window))
    .filter(col("prev").isNotNull() & (col("cnt") > col("prev")))
    .select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
)
